remarks: Tucked away on a quiet private road and set on a beautifully landscaped 1.03 acre this amazing Cranbury 3 bedroom contemporary ranch was owned and designed by an established custom builder of contemporaries in Fairfield County and is surrounded by mature trees and gardens. Known for the open concept, Sun drenched rooms, and high or vaulted ceilings his homes focused on connecting your indoor living space with nature through natural lighting and windows. Step inside to discover a bright, open layout that offers both comfort & ease of living. The spacious living room flows effortlessly into the eat-in kitchen and dining area with a corner fireplace and built-ins as the focal point. The private primary offers a peaceful retreat along with the 2 additional bedrooms and full hall bath. The partially finished expansive lower level is perfect for a playroom, gym, media area, or home office. Just minutes from schools, shopping, dining, Cranbury Park and the best of both Norwalk & Wilton. The location truly can't be beat.
